name: Download Transcript as VTT
description: Download the Teams meeting transcript as a .vtt file from a SharePoint Stream recording page

steps.description: Click the Transcript button in the bottom nav bar to load the transcript panel (loads below viewport)
steps.expression: (function() { var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { var t = btns[i].textContent.trim(); if (t === 'Transcript' && t !== 'Read transcript') { btns[i].click(); return 'clicked Transcript'; } } return 'Transcript button not found'; })()

steps.description: Click the Download button in the transcript panel to open format dropdown
steps.expression: (function() { var btn = document.getElementById('downloadTranscript'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'clicked downloadTranscript'; } return 'downloadTranscript button not found'; })()

steps.description: Select 'Download as .vtt' from the dropdown menu
steps.expression: (function() { var items = document.querySelectorAll('[role=menuitem], [role=option], .ms-ContextualMenu-item, .ms-ContextualMenu-link'); for (var i = items.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (items[i].textContent.trim() === 'Download as .vtt') { items[i].click(); return 'clicked Download as .vtt'; } } return '.vtt option not found'; })()

elementNotes.transcriptButton: Bottom nav bar has: Trim, Transcript, Interactivity, Notes, Comments, Video settings, Analytics. The Transcript button may share a name with 'Read transcript' overlay on the video — filter by exact match.
elementNotes.downloadButton: Has id='downloadTranscript'. Appears in transcript panel which loads below viewport at ~y:632. Has a dropdown with 'Download as .docx' and 'Download as .vtt'.
elementNotes.vttDownload: VTT downloads to browser's default Downloads folder. Filename is the meeting name (without timestamp suffix), e.g. 'Meeting Name.vtt'. May get (1) suffix if already exists.
elementNotes.timing: Transcript panel loads async after clicking Transcript button. Allow 1-2 seconds between step 1 and step 2. The download dropdown appears immediately after clicking Download.
elementNotes.tabStrategy: CRITICAL: Always open each recording in a NEW tab (browser_tabs action='new'). Reusing/navigating within an existing SharePoint Stream tab causes the SPA to get stuck on a loading spinner. Close the tab after download completes.
elementNotes.transcriptFallback: The first step uses exact match 'Transcript'. If not found, fallback searches for any button containing 'Transcript' excluding 'Read transcript'. The button text may have extra whitespace from React rendering.
